register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create a new account
register.agreeToTerms: By registering, you agree to our
register.otpSent: A verification code has been sent to {{email}}
register.successMessage: Your email has been verified successfully. You can now use the app.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a verification code
forgotPassword.emailSent: Password reset link has been sent to your email
forgotPassword.codeSent: A verification code has been sent to {{email}}

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set your new password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been changed successfully
resetPassword.successMessage: You can now sign in with your new password

logout.title: Logout
logout.message: Are you sure you want to logout?

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.scheduled: Your account will be deleted within 7 days

accounts.title: Manage Your Accounts
accounts.description: Track your cash, bank accounts, and credit cards in one place. Create accounts in different currencies.

contacts.title: Contact Tracking
contacts.description: Easily manage all your receivables and payables with customers and suppliers.

staff.title: Staff Management
staff.description: Track your staff's salaries, advances, and other payments regularly.

analysis.title: Income & Expense Analysis
analysis.description: Analyze your business finances with detailed reports and charts.

professional.title: Professional Features
professional.description: Export your data to Excel. Support for TRY, USD, EUR and more currencies.

sector.title: What kind of business do you run?
sector.subtitle: We'll tailor your ledger to your business. One tap is enough.

tabela.title: What's your business name?
tabela.subtitle: Type what's on your signboard. You can change it later.

create.title: Let's set up your business
create.subtitle: Let's create a few basics together so you see how the app works. You can skip if you like.

firstEntry.title: Add your first entry
firstEntry.subtitle: What happened at the shop today?

done.title: Your business is ready! 🎉
done.subtitle: Now you can track income-expenses, contacts and staff all in one place.

tip.title: Don't forget to enter your data
tip.body: Log your income and expenses regularly to see whether you're making a profit or a loss. Check the Reports page to see where your money goes.

done.reminderDescription: Every evening at closing time I'll remind you to log the day. You can turn it off anytime.

messages.accountCreated: Your account has been created successfully
